mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group g WHERE

WITH -- 1. 先分页查 ID（只操作主表，避免宽表排序） page_ids_raw AS ( SELECT id FROM ( SELECT id FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group g WHERE ORDER BY updated_time DESC, id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ), -- 2. 给 ID 编上页内行号，用于截取 offset page_ids AS ( SELECT id, ROWNUM AS rn FROM page_ids_raw ) -- 3. 只对最终页的 ID 进行关联查询 SELECT g.id AS group_id, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.group_category, g.group_type_code, org.org_name AS bu_name, manager.user_name AS manager_name, CASE WHEN g.is_important = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS important, CASE WHEN g.is_key_customer = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS key_customer, CASE WHEN g.is_139 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is139, g.location_type, g.contact_book_status, -- 4. 改为标量子查询，只针对当前页取"最近一月 service_id=15(总收入)的金额" COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(rev.revenue_amount) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_group_revenue_monthly rev WHERE rev.group_id = g.group_code AND rev.service_id = 15 AND rev.revenue_month = (SELECT MAX(revenue_month) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_group_revenue_monthly WHERE service_id = 15) ), 0) AS last_month_revenue FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group g INNER JOIN page_ids p ON g.id = p.id LEFT JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_org org ON org.id = g.bu_org_id LEFT JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_user manager ON manager.id = g.manager_user_id WHERE p.rn > #{offset} ORDER BY g.updated_time DESC, g.id DESC
SELECT id FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group WHERE manager_user_id = #{managerUserId} AND status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0
SELECT id FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group WHERE bu_org_id = #{orgId} AND status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0

SELECT g.id AS group_id, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.group_category, g.group_type_code, org.org_name AS bu_name, manager.user_name AS manager_name, CASE WHEN g.is_important = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS important, CASE WHEN g.is_key_customer = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS key_customer, CASE WHEN g.is_139 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is139, g.location_type, g.main_contact_name, g.main_contact_phone, g.contact_book_status, g.social_security_count, g.status FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group g LEFT JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_org org ON org.id = g.bu_org_id LEFT JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_user manager ON manager.id = g.manager_user_id WHERE g.id = #{groupId} AND g.deleted_flag = 0
